SEARCH
Package io.perl.api

Class LatencyPercentiles

java.lang.Object
io.perl.api.LatencyPercentiles
public final class LatencyPercentiles extends Object
Helper that holds the configured percentile fractions and computed percentile latency results. The class is used by latency recorders to map bucketed latencies into percentile values.

Usage overview:

  1. Create an instance with the desired percentile fractions (e.g. {0.5, 0.9, 0.99}).
  2. Call reset(long) with the expected total number of records to compute internal target indexes for percentiles.
  3. Feed bucketed latency summaries to copyLatency(long, long, long, long) which will populate the percentile latencies when the buckets cover the target indexes.

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field

    final double[]

    Percentile fractions (e.g.
    final long[]

    latenciesCount
    Counts for each percentile (populated during copyLatency).
    final long[]
    latencyIndexes
    Target indexes, computed in reset(long) for each percentile.
    long
    medianIndex
    Median index position used to detect median bucket.
    long
    medianLatency
    Median latency value (computed as the 50th percentile approximation).

  • Field Details

    • fractions

      public final double[] fractions
      Percentile fractions (e.g. 0.5 for 50th percentile).

    • latencies

      public final long[] latencies
      Computed latency values for each configured percentile.

    • latencyIndexes

      public final long[] latencyIndexes
      Target indexes, computed in reset(long) for each percentile.

    • latenciesCount

      public final long[] latenciesCount
      Counts for each percentile (populated during copyLatency).

    • medianLatency

      public long medianLatency
      Median latency value (computed as the 50th percentile approximation).

    • medianIndex

      public long medianIndex
      Median index position used to detect median bucket.

  • Constructor Details

    • LatencyPercentiles

      public LatencyPercentiles(double[] percentileFractions)
      Construct with the configured percentile fractions.
      Parameters:
      percentileFractions - array of fractions in range (0,1]

  • Method Details

    • reset

      public void reset(long totalRecords)
      Reset internal target indexes and counters using the provided total records count. After reset, callers should feed bucket summaries using copyLatency(long,long,long,long) to populate percentile values.
      Parameters:
      totalRecords - total number of records expected in the window

    • copyLatency

      public void copyLatency(long latency, long count, long startIndex, long endIndex)
      Copy latency for a bucket spanning [startIndex, endIndex). If any configured percentile target index lies inside the bucket, the corresponding percentile value and count will be set.
      Parameters:
      latency - latency value for the bucket
      count - count of samples in the bucket
      startIndex - inclusive start index of the bucket
      endIndex - exclusive end index of the bucket
